div.p: Components: Hashmap for O(1) Lookup + Doubly Linked List for O(1) Eviction Constraints: Fixed Capacity, Thread-Safe (Mutex protected in implementation)

g.title: Maps key strings to memory pointers of Entry nodes in the DLL
Maintains recency order. Head is Most Recently Used (MRU), Tail is Least Recently Used (LRU).

ol.li: Update: if exists, node.val = val, promote
Insert: if new, create node, DLL.pushFront(node), map[key]=node
Evict: if size > cap, DLL.popTail(), delete from map

g.title: Maps key strings to memory pointers of Entry nodes in the DLL
Maintains recency order. Head is Most Recently Used (MRU), Tail is Least Recently Used (LRU).
